welcome: 👋 Welcome to Rydex — your taxi in Northern Cyprus. Choose your language to get started:
send_pickup:
📍 Where should we pick you up?

Share your location or choose a saved place below.
send_destination:
🏁 Where are you going?

Share your location or choose a saved place below.
not_in_zone:
😔 Sorry, we don't operate in this area yet.

We're available in Northern Cyprus.
same_location: ⚠️ Pickup and destination can't be the same place.
searching:
🔍 Looking for a driver nearby...

This usually takes under a minute.
searching_wait: ⏳ Still searching for a driver. Please wait...
no_drivers:
😔 No drivers available right now.

Please try again in a few minutes.
active_order: ⏳ You already have an active ride in progress.
order_again: ✅ Your ride is complete. You can order again anytime!
driver_arrived: 📍 Your driver has arrived! Please head to the pickup point.
trip_started: 🚗 Your ride has started. Sit back and enjoy the trip!
thanks_rating: ⭐ Thanks for rating! See you next time.
trip_info: 🚕 Ride Summary 📏 Distance: {distance:.2f} km ⏱ Est. time: ~{time} min 💵 ${usd:.2f} USD 💶 €{eur} 💴 ₺{try_} Confirm your ride?
trip_info_promo: 🚕 Ride Summary 📏 Distance: {distance:.2f} km ⏱ Est. time: ~{time} min ~~${original:.2f}~~ → ${usd:.2f} USD 🎉 💶 €{eur} 💴 ₺{try_} 🎟 Promo: {promo} (−${discount:.2f}) Confirm your ride?
order_taken: ✖ Sorry, this ride was already taken by another driver.
stop_live: 🔴 Trip finished! Please stop sharing your Live Location.
pay_crypto: 💎 Pay with USDT (TRC20) 💰 Amount: {amount:.2f} USDT 📋 Send to this address: {address} After sending, tap the button below.
payment_pending:
⏳ Payment sent to admin for verification.

Please wait a moment...
payment_rejected:
❌ Payment could not be verified.

Please try again or pay with cash.
admin_payment: 💰 Payment to verify 👤 @{username} 💵 Amount: ${amount:.2f} USDT Confirm this payment?
banned:
🚫 Your account has been suspended.

Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
temp_banned: ⏳ You've cancelled too many rides recently. 🚫 Ordering is paused for {minutes} min.
cancel_warning: ⚠️ You've cancelled {count}/{max} rides in the last {window} min. One more cancellation will pause your account for {hours} hours.
favorite_name: 📝 Enter a name for this place: Examples: Home, Work, Gym
low_rating_prompt: ✏️ What went wrong? Your feedback helps us improve. Send a message or type /skip
promo_invalid: ❌ Invalid promo code. Try again or skip.
promo_used: ❌ This promo code has already been used.
driver_delay:
🕐 Your driver is on the way but taking a bit longer than expected.

Thank you for your patience!
history_empty: 📋 You don't have any completed rides yet.
help: 🚖 Rydex — How it works 1️⃣ Press Order a Ride 2️⃣ Share your pickup location 3️⃣ Share your destination 4️⃣ Confirm the price 5️⃣ Choose payment: Cash or USDT 6️⃣ Wait for a driver — usually under 2 min! 💰 Pricing Base fare: $3.50 Per km: $0.45 💳 Payment • Cash — pay the driver directly • USDT TRC20 — crypto payment ⭐ Saved places After each ride you can save the destination for quick ordering. 📋 Use /history to see your past rides. 🆘 Support Contact: @rydex_support Use /language to change language.
